headline: Eli Lilly: Exceptional Pipeline, Less Attractive Entry Point (Rating Downgrade)
summary: Eli Lilly hits a 52-week high on retatrutide, Mounjaro & Kisunla growth, but valuation and Omvoh demand prompt a Hold rating. Click for this LLY update.

headline: Piper Sandler and Morgan Stanley Highlight Amgen (AMGN) on Pipeline Strength and Obesity Drug Potential
summary: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) ranks among the best set-it-and-forget-it stocks to buy right now. On June 12, Piper Sandler reaffirmed its Overweight rating and $427 price target for Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN). The firm published a detailed review of the Sjogren’s syndrome therapeutic development environment in advance of Amgen’s CD40 ligand-directed fusion protein dazodalibep’s Phase III conclusion […]
